text.title: Service Delivery SOP Template Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Service Delivery SOP Template applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Service: GA4 + GTM analytics setup for SMB clients. SOP version: 1.0.0 Owner: U_FOUNDER (Faion solopreneur agency). Steps: 5 (intake, ga4-property, gtm-install, events, handoff). Time budgets per step: 30 / 20 / 60 / 45 / 30 min (total 185 min ≈ 3h). Engagement acceptance: - client signs handoff - all conversion events fire in DebugView - GTM preview clean First senior-contractor execution: 195 min (within budget). One escalation at step 3 (CMP edge case); resolved via branch-a path. Result: founder QA time = 15 min instead of 3h.
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
